# REM Auto Mobile Mechanic

REM Auto Mobile Mechanic is a local mobile automotive repair service based in Rehoboth Beach, DE. 

## Services
- On-Site Diagnostic Scan
- Brake Pad & Rotor Replacement
- Preventative Maintenance
- Pre-Purchase Inspection
- Battery & Alternator Replacement
- Starter Replacement

## Contact
- Phone: (302) 212-7643
- Location: 2014 Ramblewood Dr, Rehoboth Beach, DE 19971
- Hours: Monday - Sunday, 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- [Book an Appointment](https://peninsula-mechanic-react.vercel.app)

We travel directly to the customer's driveway, office lot, or job site to provide transparent, dealership-quality repairs without the wait.
